/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/sym_eval.cpp.o -o benchmark   -L/home/suleiman/miniconda3/envs/go2-convex-mpc/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/suleiman/miniconda3/envs/go2-convex-mpc/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib /home/suleiman/miniconda3/envs/go2-convex-mpc/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /home/suleiman/miniconda3/envs/go2-convex-mpc/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so /home/suleiman/miniconda3/envs/go2-convex-mpc/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so
